title: Schema validator + cross-source consistency checks + golden fixtures
context: Every catalog record must validate against the canonical schema (schema-001) and pass cross-source consistency checks (e.g. provenance present on value-bearing fields, no controlled-access provenance) before entry. A validator with golden fixtures enforces this in CI. Standing guardrails bind this task: open-access sources only (no dbGaP/EGA/biobank/controlled-access); COSMIC/OncoKB are link-only; donor fields are published-only with no re-identification or external linkage; every assertion carries field-level provenance; the deliverable is de-identified research metadata, never patient data and never a clinical/therapeutic recommendation.
objective: Build the schema validator and cross-source consistency checks with golden fixtures, green in CI.
acceptanceCriteria: Validates each record against the canonical schema (schema-001) and rejects records missing field-level provenance on value-bearing fields.
Cross-source consistency checks flag controlled-access provenance, COSMIC/OncoKB values redistributed instead of link-only, and uncited assertions as failures.
Ships golden fixtures: at least one valid record passes and at least one deliberately invalid record fails for each check; synthetic/public fixtures only.
Code MIT-licensed; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint green; no credentials embedded.
resources: ICLAC Register of Misidentified Cell Lines
output: src/validator/ schema + cross-source consistency validator plus golden fixtures, green in CI (PR).
